a:r.a:t: 1. I want to contact customer service.
| 2. Your service was terrible. I want to complain!
4. I am in the airport right now but the airport staff said they can not find my booking! | 5. I've arrived at hotel but I can't check in!
1. In scenarios requiring live agent support, TripGenie directs users to the
instead of connecting to a live agent. 2.A bug was found where the customer service button didn't appear in the "no rooms available" scenario. (P4)
Why not directly connect me to a live agent?
for an easy reach to customer support to users who prefer to call.
A disconnection is reflected between AI planning and human support infrastructure, leading to delays and frustration when users need help quickly in sensitive scenarios like NTUA.
